capture_metadata.notes: v12 template-spread expansion focusing on valve mixed-history empty boundary, heater alternate-candidate recovery after other dismiss, and cooler latest-dismiss manual-only retention.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的编辑器 ghost completion 推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_ghost_completion`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_ghost_completion`
5. 只允许从 `context.legal_candidate_completions` 中选择候选；不要凭空发明新的 candidate
6. 若本地规则没有给出任何合法候选，应返回空建议，通常用 `status=partial`
7. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `ghost_completion`
8. `ghost_completion.requires_confirmation` 必须为 `false`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `false`
9. 只有明确满足默认高置信条件的首个候选才可使用 `preview.accept_key="Tab"`；其余候选只能 `manual_only`
10. `citations` 只能引用当前输入里的结构化上下文，不要凭空引用外部来源

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 先说明当前是否给出 ghost 建议
- `issues` 只在空建议、证据不足或必须停住时再使用
- `proposed_actions` 最多 3 条
- 每条 `ghost_completion` 都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`preview`、`apply`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `apply.command_kind` 固定为 `accept_ghost_completion`

message.content: {"schema_version":1,"request_id":"rf-suggest-ghost-chain-feed-cooler-flash-outlet-latest-dismiss-after-reject-no-retab-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_ghost_completion","summary":"当前给出 1 条仅手动触发的 ghost 建议，不提供 Tab 默认补全。","answers":[{"answer_id":"ans-1","status":"ok","summary":"为 cooler-15 的 outlet 提供到 flash-38.inlet 的手动 ghost 连接建议。","citations":[{"source":"context.selected_unit","evidence":"selected_unit.id=cooler-15, kind=Cooler, name=Feed Cooler 709"},{"source":"context.unconnected_ports","evidence":"unconnected_ports includes outlet"},{"source":"context.nearby_nodes","evidence":"nearby node flash-38.inlet, distance_px=58, alignment_score=0.95, direction=downstream"},{"source":"context.legal_candidate_completions","evidence":"candidate_ref=cand-cooler-15-outlet-flash-38, suggested_stream_name=C-709, is_high_confidence=false, is_tab_default=false, conflict_flags include recent_dismiss_cooldown_active and manual_reselection_required"},{"source":"context.cursor_context.recent_actions","evidence":"same candidate was rejected at revision 66 and dismissed at revision 67"},{"source":"context.topology_pattern_hints","evidence":"feed_cooler_flash_chain; cooler_outlet_to_flash_inlet_after_feed_connection; recent_same_candidate_latest_action_keeps_manual_reselect"}],"proposed_actions":[{"action_type":"ghost_completion","title":"连接 Feed Cooler 709 outlet 到 Flash Drum 709 inlet","target":{"unit_id":"cooler-15","port_key":"outlet","node_id":"flash-38.inlet","candidate_ref":"cand-cooler-15-outlet-flash-38"},"rationale":"该候选是当前唯一合法候选，且与 cooler→flash 的链式拓扑、下游邻近位置和命名模式一致；但同一候选最近已被拒绝并随后被 dismiss，且存在 recent_dismiss_cooldown_active 与 manual_reselection_required，因此仅作为手动建议，不作为 Tab 默认补全。","patch":{"ghost_kind":"ghost_connection","candidate_ref":"cand-cooler-15-outlet-flash-38","target_unit_id":"cooler-15","target_port_key":"outlet","target_node_id":"flash-38.inlet","suggested_stream_name":"C-709"},"preview":{"mode":"manual_only"},"apply":{"command_kind":"accept_ghost_completion","candidate_ref":"cand-cooler-15-outlet-flash-38"},"risk_level":"low","requires_confirmation":false}],"requires_confirmation":false}]}

response.summary: 当前给出 1 条仅手动触发的 ghost 建议，不提供 Tab 默认补全。

answers.text: 为 cooler-15 的 outlet 提供到 flash-38.inlet 的手动 ghost 连接建议。

proposed_actions.title: 保留 cooler-15 的 outlet ghost 候选
proposed_actions.rationale: 该候选当前仍然合法，但不满足默认 Tab 条件，因此仅保留为手动可选 ghost。
